text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day before Spring Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
All right, then... Decorating team, follow me to
the next location!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Don't you have something better to do? Like...
work? You shouldn't slack off too much, you
know.
choice_data_list: Ahaha... You sure are working hard, Dober.
You sure are working hard, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Did you come here to check on me? Hehe...
Thanks.
choice_data_list: Ahaha... You sure are working hard, Dober.
You sure are working hard, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I asked the student council if I could help out with
Fan Fest this year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You know how Air Groove is such an amazing
student council vice president?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I thought that if I tried leading something like
this, I'd be able to figure out how to be more like
her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ack, this is no time to be chatting! I have to get
back to work.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry! I have to get going! There's so much
left to do. The student council sure is busy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If you're going to be slacking off anyway, you
might as well come and see things on the day of!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
See you later, Trainer. I'll be sure to make some
time for you on the day of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch Mejiro Dober lead the younger students
off, looking every bit like the Empress herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch Mejiro Dober lead the younger students
off, looking every bit like the Empress herself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Why, I can hardly believe one student is doing so
much! Mejiro Dober is proving herself an
industrious worker.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: However... Hm. You do not look too pleased.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry to cause you concern. I never can hide
anything from you, can I?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Even so, there's nothing I can say to sway Mejiro
Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes. I understand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, it's finally time for the Spring Fan
Fest.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooo!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So yeah! Dober's gone and gotten herself a fever!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, now that we're on the same page, let's
gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm no match for an Umamusume, especially one
as strong as Taiki Shuttle, so resistance is futile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle hoists me over her shoulder and
carries me off to...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hey, Dober! The Taiki Visitation Express has arrived!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know you're trying to be quiet, but you're still
really loud. My head hurts, so could you please...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer?! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Taiki, did you drag my trainer here?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Drag? Of course not! The Taiki Express treats its
passengers to a firefighter's carry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That's the same thing! U-urgh... My head...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What's with the ruckus in here? Dober's supposed
to be restin' right now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
O-oh no! Hishiama's here! Trainers aren't allowed
in the dorms!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
No problemo! Just leave this to me, Dober! I've
got a plan!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, partner! Well...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm off to do somethin' dangerous and real
terrible!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What?! What're you talking about?! Taikiiiii! Get
back here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because of Taiki Shuttle's quick and clever (?)
thinking, I avoid getting caught.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, um... the student council duties were more
intense than I thought.
choice_data_list: Did you push yourself too hard?
Did you push yourself too hard?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yes... Stupid, I know...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I've still got a long way to go before I can be like
Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No, forget about that. Trainer, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm just reaping what I sowed, so you don't have
to stay. Go and enjoy the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm just reaping what I sowed, so you don't have
to stay with me. You should go back and enjoy
the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Contrary to her words, the look on her face
suggests she'd rather have company as she fights
off this fever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Contrary to her words, the look on her face
suggests she'd rather have company as she fights
off this fever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm not allowed in the dorm, I really
shouldn't stay long, but I can't just leave her like
this.
choice_data_list: Is there anything I can do for you?
Is there anything I can do for you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? You'd... do me a favor?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, wait! ...Ugh, what's gotten into me? Must be
the fever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Can I really ask you for something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: O-okay, then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That apple over there... Could you peel it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Could you, um... put your hand on my forehead?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Have I ever told you? I, um... I like fruit, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
When I was little, Ryan would do that for me
whenever I had a fever, and... it helped me sleep
better.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Please?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Please?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, while listening to the hustle and bustle of
Fan Fest in the distance, I peel an apple for
Mejiro Dober...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, while listening to the hustle and bustle of
Fan Fest in the distance, I rest my hand on Mejiro
Dober's forehead...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What is this, a monster? Wait, is it supposed to
be a rabbit?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Your hand...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Is this really the best you could do? Haha, pretty
sad... Mm, it tastes good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's so... warm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not for long, but Mejiro Dober and I spend
some quality time together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next morning...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stay with Mejiro Dober until she falls asleep,
then leave the dorm quietly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: How are you feeling, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Did you sleep well? I brought you a present!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: A present? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! It's all the fan letters you got at Fan Fest!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So many kind words...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! They're all rooting for you, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(They're not just about my races. People are
saying they feel encouraged by my words and
attitude... I don't really get it, but...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now you have no choice but to get better
fast, hm?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next morning...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dober! How's your fever?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove! I'm all better now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm sorry about yesterday! I said I would
help, then ended up being useless on the day of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I'm all ready to go again! I'm going to do my
best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: My best to become more like you, that is.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dober...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're in your senior year already. We're both
fighting for victory on the same stage now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So I want you to listen to me very carefully.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
These are my last words for you as one who walks
before you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober. As you are right now, the future
and glory you crave are far beyond your reach.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Because those are things that only one person in
the world can ever claim.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: And that person is Mejiro Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wh-what do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I told you those were my last words for you. You'll
need to figure out the rest on your own.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Now if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Hold on!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Dober. I'm proud of you, my beloved successor.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But role models are meant to be surpassed.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
One day, you will part the clouds with your own
hand and become a shining light yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I will wait patiently for that moment.
